array.string: cd /Users/ww/Project/poly_strategy && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 LIMIT=100 PAGES=5 BATCH_SIZE=5 CONTEXT_MARKET_LIMIT=0 LLM_WORKERS=4 LLM_ERROR_RETRIES=2 LLM_ERROR_RETRY_BATCH_SIZE=1 LLM_FALLBACK_MODEL=gpt-5.5 LLM_FALLBACK_ERROR_RETRIES=2 LLM_FALLBACK_ERROR_RETRY_BATCH_SIZE=1 LLM_TIMEOUT=180 LLM_REASONING_EFFORT=high INCLUDE_TOP_MARKETS=150 INCLUDE_TOP_NEG_RISK_GROUPS=25 MAX_WATCHLIST_MARKETS=250 scripts/refresh_discovery_watchlist.sh
